taxonomy.character_entity: persistent product-role identity used in orchestration. who the persona is
taxonomy.variant: a deployment of a character_entity in a specific collective, tier, and role. what the persona does in that context
taxonomy.collective: a platform-hosted group of variants (shannon, haunting, gander, ibeji, squad)
taxonomy.tier: the role level within a collective (entropy/poltergeist/profile/theseus/ghost)

slug_standard.rationale: hs- prefix signals heraldstack ownership. collective before tier allows fast filtering by platform. persona before role preserves the character-first ordering

collectives.name: squadron
collectives.platform: github copilot (brady gaster subagent config method)

coverage_note: each persona file contains full identity data in yaml frontmatter plus a markdown body. collective repos hold variant definitions (e.g. shannon-claude-code-cli/.claude/agents/hs-shannon-theseus-<persona>-<role>.md) which reference this canonical source for identity and scope only their specific duty locally

access_channels.mcp: qdrant-shared-knowledge collection, search by persona id
access_channels.filesystem_microvm: mount github.com/heraldstack/heraldstack read-only at /srv/heraldstack, read personas/<id>.md
